help.title: Help & Support
help.faq1q: How do I split money in a group?
help.faq1a: Open the group you want, tap the add-expense button, enter the amount and choose participants. EasySplit will automatically calculate each person's share.
help.faq2q: How do I invite members to a group?
help.faq2a: Open the group, go to Members and share the invite code. The invitee enters it on the "Join group" screen to join.
help.faq3a: EasySplit automatically optimizes the number of transactions so everyone settles up in the fewest steps. See details in the group's Settlement section.
help.faq4a: Data is stored securely and only group members can see that group's expense info.

account.errNotLoggedIn: You need to sign in to update your info.
